hyperedges.label: CI Pipeline: Build and Upload Game Artifacts

nodes.label: Bake equirectangular texture maps from the analytic shape field.  Two passes, bo
nodes.norm_label: bake equirectangular texture maps from the analytic shape field.  two passes, bo

nodes.label: Apply ``fn(y0, y1)`` over row-bands, optionally across ``jobs`` threads.      Ba
nodes.norm_label: apply ``fn(y0, y1)`` over row-bands, optionally across ``jobs`` threads.      ba

nodes.label: Directions + spherical tangent basis + latitude band for rows [y0, y1).
nodes.norm_label: directions + spherical tangent basis + latitude band for rows [y0, y1).

nodes.label: Assemble a Godot-ready GLB from the shape field + baked PBR textures.  The low-p
nodes.norm_label: assemble a godot-ready glb from the shape field + baked pbr textures.  the low-p

nodes.label: Return GLB bytes for the asteroid described by ``params``.
nodes.norm_label: return glb bytes for the asteroid described by ``params``.

nodes.label: Per-vertex glTF TANGENT (vec4): T = normalize(d u / d lon), w = handedness.
nodes.norm_label: per-vertex gltf tangent (vec4): t = normalize(d u / d lon), w = handedness.

nodes.label: Deterministic asteroid shape field — the single source of randomness.  Asteroids
nodes.norm_label: deterministic asteroid shape field — the single source of randomness.  asteroids

nodes.label: Derive a fully-explicit shape description from an integer seed.
nodes.norm_label: derive a fully-explicit shape description from an integer seed.

nodes.label: Multi-scale Gaussian bumps baked into the MESH geometry (broad erosion + boulder
nodes.norm_label: multi-scale gaussian bumps baked into the mesh geometry (broad erosion + boulder

nodes.label: Sum of Gaussian bumps and its gradient: a*exp(s*(u·C - 1)).
nodes.norm_label: sum of gaussian bumps and its gradient: a*exp(s*(u·c - 1)).

nodes.label: Convex faceted support r = min_i d_i/max(u·N_i, eps) and its gradient.
nodes.norm_label: convex faceted support r = min_i d_i/max(u·n_i, eps) and its gradient.

nodes.label: Scalar band-limited field sum_j amp_j*sin(F_j·u + phase_j), roughly in [-1, 1].
nodes.norm_label: scalar band-limited field sum_j amp_j*sin(f_j·u + phase_j), roughly in [-1, 1].

nodes.label: Select only the bumps whose angular footprint reaches the [lat_lo, lat_hi] band.
nodes.norm_label: select only the bumps whose angular footprint reaches the [lat_lo, lat_hi] band.

nodes.label: The type silhouette only (lobes / facets), without the medium relief.
nodes.norm_label: the type silhouette only (lobes / facets), without the medium relief.

nodes.label: Base radial field value + gradient (silhouette + medium relief; drives the mesh)
nodes.norm_label: base radial field value + gradient (silhouette + medium relief; drives the mesh)

nodes.label: Unit-field BASE radius (mesh silhouette); excludes detail. No ``p['radius']``.
nodes.norm_label: unit-field base radius (mesh silhouette); excludes detail. no ``p['radius']``.

nodes.label: Surface points ``radius * r_base(u) * u`` in world units (mesh geometry).
nodes.norm_label: surface points ``radius * r_base(u) * u`` in world units (mesh geometry).

nodes.label: Return (normal, detail_height) for the full base+detail surface at ``u``.      `
nodes.norm_label: return (normal, detail_height) for the full base+detail surface at ``u``.      `

nodes.label: UV-sphere direction grid with a duplicated seam column for clean UVs (y-up).
nodes.norm_label: uv-sphere direction grid with a duplicated seam column for clean uvs (y-up).

nodes.label: Bake tileable PBR texture sets, one per *material kind* (not per ship).  Each ki
nodes.norm_label: bake tileable pbr texture sets, one per *material kind* (not per ship).  each ki

nodes.label: Return (albedo, normal, orm) PIL RGB images for ``kind``, deterministic in ``see
nodes.norm_label: return (albedo, normal, orm) pil rgb images for ``kind``, deterministic in ``see

nodes.label: Seamless fractal noise in [-1,1]: a sum of integer-frequency 2D sinusoids (perio
nodes.norm_label: seamless fractal noise in [-1,1]: a sum of integer-frequency 2d sinusoids (perio

nodes.label: Periodic grid of thin grooves (1 in a groove, 0 on a plate), tiling at ``cells``
nodes.norm_label: periodic grid of thin grooves (1 in a groove, 0 on a plate), tiling at ``cells``

nodes.label: A varied but plausible hull: fuselage + canopy + symmetric engines, optional win
nodes.norm_label: a varied but plausible hull: fuselage + canopy + symmetric engines, optional win

nodes.label: Assemble a Godot-ready GLB from placed parts + hardpoints.  One self-contained `
nodes.norm_label: assemble a godot-ready glb from placed parts + hardpoints.  one self-contained `

nodes.label: ``placed`` is a list of (mesh, kind); ``hardpoints`` a list of     {kind, index,
nodes.norm_label: ``placed`` is a list of (mesh, kind); ``hardpoints`` a list of     {kind, index,

nodes.label: Per-vertex glTF TANGENT (vec4 xyz + handedness w) derived from the UV gradient.
nodes.norm_label: per-vertex gltf tangent (vec4 xyz + handedness w) derived from the uv gradient.

nodes.label: Quaternion [x,y,z,w] for a basis whose local +Z aligns with ``forward`` (mirrors
nodes.norm_label: quaternion [x,y,z,w] for a basis whose local +z aligns with ``forward`` (mirrors

nodes.label: Modular parametric part primitives for the spaceship generator.  Every generator
nodes.norm_label: modular parametric part primitives for the spaceship generator.  every generator

nodes.label: Add a planar quad p0->p1->p2->p3 (CCW). If ``normal`` is None it is derived
nodes.norm_label: add a planar quad p0->p1->p2->p3 (ccw). if ``normal`` is none it is derived

nodes.label: 8 corners of a (possibly front-tapered) box: back half-extents (hx,hy) at z=-hz,
nodes.norm_label: 8 corners of a (possibly front-tapered) box: back half-extents (hx,hy) at z=-hz,

nodes.label: A rectangular box, size [x, y, z].
nodes.norm_label: a rectangular box, size [x, y, z].

nodes.label: A frustum: a box whose +Z (front) end is scaled by ``taper`` [tx, ty]. ``[0,0]``
nodes.norm_label: a frustum: a box whose +z (front) end is scaled by ``taper`` [tx, ty]. ``[0,0]``

nodes.label: A capped tube along Z (radius ``radius`` at the back), front radius = radius*tap
nodes.norm_label: a capped tube along z (radius ``radius`` at the back), front radius = radius*tap

nodes.label: A sphere scaled to half-extents ``size`` [x, y, z] (cockpit canopy / escape pod)
nodes.norm_label: a sphere scaled to half-extents ``size`` [x, y, z] (cockpit canopy / escape pod)

nodes.label: A right-triangular fin: thin along X (thickness size[0]), rising to height size[
nodes.norm_label: a right-triangular fin: thin along x (thickness size[0]), rising to height size[

nodes.label: Build the local-space mesh for one part spec (the keys other than placement are
nodes.norm_label: build the local-space mesh for one part spec (the keys other than placement are

nodes.label: Return a copy of ``mesh`` transformed into ship-local space. ``mirror_x`` reflec
nodes.norm_label: return a copy of ``mesh`` transformed into ship-local space. ``mirror_x`` reflec
